arts.ttl: Club will seek another deal with Aston Villa despite disappointment – Negotiations shouldn’t be difficult
arts.sum: Vasco de Gama will seek to renew Philippe Coutinho’s loan deal from Aston Villa this summer, despite general disappointment around his time at the club so far. That’s according to O Globo, who report that Vasco will look to keep the midfielder over fellow signing Dimitri Payet. arts.ttl: Player backed for Premier League after Tottenham send scout to watch him against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Club Brugge star Ardon Jashari is ready made for the Premier League, with Tottenham one of several sides already scouting him. That’s according to Steven Defour whose comments to Het Laatste Nieuws have been relayed by Voetbal Primeur. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford exit 'could cost Man Utd £20m' if he leaves permanently this summer
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks almost certain to leave Manchester United this summer after joining Aston Villa on loan, but the Red Devils face having to shell out a huge sum to offload him due to his £325,000-a-week salary
